title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara founded Kalshi, a regulated financial exchange for prediction markets on real-world events, after years of regulatory battles and a lawsuit against the overseeing government agency. The startup achieved a 22 billion dollar valuation and millions of customers after four years of development before rapid scale.
